name: Beef Porcupines
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix half of marinara sauce with everything except for consomme, oil, and water. Form meatballs.
2. Fry meatballs in oil until lightly browned.
3. Add the remaining marinara sauce, consomme, and water. Cook until tender, about 40 minutes, with the pan covered. Alternatively, bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 minutes from the Frozen Assets List by frozen-assets@xc.org ("Marie Braden") on August 13, 1998.
